text: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.

gcb.mirror: Reality begins in God, not in man.
gcb.water: Creation is ordered and prepared for life.
gcb.fire: The opening verse establishes divine authority over all existence.

text: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep.

gcb.mirror: The unformed world reflects the condition of man before divine ordering.
gcb.water: The Spirit hovers over chaos as preparation and cleansing.
gcb.fire: God transforms disorder without surrendering to it.

text: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.

gcb.fire: The word of God creates distinction.

text: But with thee will I establish my covenant.

gcb.mirror: Covenant reveals divine intentionality in judgment and preservation.
gcb.water: The covenant preserves life through the flood.
gcb.fire: Judgment and mercy meet in covenant.

text: In the same day the LORD made a covenant with Abram.

gcb.mirror: Promise is rooted in divine initiative.
gcb.water: Covenant gives structure to the promise.
gcb.fire: Faith is tested in the waiting.

gcb.water: The name stabilizes Moses in mission.
gcb.fire: The divine name confronts every false power.

text: When I see the blood, I will pass over you.

gcb.mirror: Deliverance comes by divine provision, not human merit.
gcb.water: The blood marks a people set apart.
gcb.fire: Judgment passes over those under the sign.

text: If ye will obey my voice indeed, and keep my covenant, then ye shall be a peculiar treasure unto me.

gcb.mirror: Identity is formed through covenantal obedience.
gcb.water: The covenant orders a people into belonging.
gcb.fire: Obedience separates the holy people from the nations.

text: Ye shall be holy: for I the LORD your God am holy.

gcb.mirror: Holiness reflects the character of God.

text: The LORD bless thee, and keep thee.

gcb.mirror: Blessing reveals divine favor and nearness.
gcb.water: Blessing rests upon an ordered people.
gcb.fire: Divine keeping protects through wilderness testing.

text: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God is one LORD.

gcb.mirror: The people are anchored in the oneness of God.

text: I have set before you life and death, blessing and cursing: therefore choose life.

gcb.mirror: Life with God is set before man as a real decision.
gcb.water: Covenant clarifies the path of life.
